title: Peppery Croatian Paprika Pilaf
description: This savory paprika pilaf combines the zing of fresh cilantro with a touch of sweetness and hints of spice to make a perfect hangover cure.
instructions: Rinse the rice under cold water and drain. Pat dry with paper towels.
In a medium saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and onion; sauté for about 3 minutes or until softened.
Stir in rinsed basmati rice and cook for another minute. Gradually add the cooked rice to a bowl of boiling water, stirring continuously to prevent clumping.
In a skillet, mix ground pepper with the squeezed lime juice. If using sugar, combine it into the spicy-pepper mixture as well.
Pour the seasoned peppercorn-lime mixture over the rice and stir until heated through. Mix in cilantro leaves. Serve immediately for best texture and flavor.
Enjoy this light snack that can be prepared ahead of time. Refrigerate leftovers for up to 2 days, but do not reheat or cook after opening.
